coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Member — The Member should Allow members to search and browse the book catalog by title, author, and genre.
Actor: Member — The Member should Allow members to borrow physical books and return them with automated due date tracking.
task_titles: Implement borrow physical books and return them with automated due date tracking workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Member — The Member should Allow members to reserve books that are currently on loan by other members.
task_titles: Implement reserve books that are currently workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Member — The Member should Allow members to access and read digital books and e-resources online.
task_titles: Implement and read digital books and e-resources workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Member — The Member should Allow librarians to manage member accounts, book inventory, and overdue fines.
task_titles: Implement member accounts, book inventory, and overdue management workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should maintain high availability.
task_titles: Optimize system uptime and reliability constraints

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should support barcode scanning for physical book check-in and check-out.
task_titles: Implement barcode scanning for physical book check- support workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should comply with member data privacy regulations.
task_titles: Comply with member data privacy regulations

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should maintain responsive performance for concurrent users.

risk_signals: Compliance-oriented requirements are present and should be validated early to avoid late rework.
Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
2 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.

committee_brief.domain_inference: Likely domain: library and borrowing management.
committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 6 functional task(s) and 3 non-functional task(s); 0 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.
assumption_log: Dependency sequencing was inferred for 5 task(s) to produce an executable implementation order beyond the raw prose order.
committee_brief.confidence_signal: Planning confidence is high: no low-confidence tasks were detected in the current plan.
committee_brief.graph_summary: 9 requirements -> 9 atomic tasks across 3 delivery sprints. Critical delivery path: T006 -> T001 -> T002 (3 hops, ~8 story points, estimated 4 weeks with a 2-person team). Coordination hotspot: Optimize system uptime and reliability constraints blocks 3 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 4 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 226 estimated hours | FR: 120h | NFR: 106h.
